Title: Vulnerable dependencies
Description: Multiple high-severity vulnerabilities in npm dependencies including node-tar race condition and minimatch ReDoS

Title: Hardcoded development secret fallback
Description: Authentication uses hardcoded fallback secret which could be exploited if dev code reaches production

Title: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML
Description: User-generated content rendered without sanitization in highlightedTitle and highlightedDescription

Title: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML in publisher
Description: Publisher data rendered without sanitization allowing potential XSS

Title: Command injection risk
Description: PythonRunner constructs shell commands with user input without proper escaping

Title: Missing input validation
Description: Config API uses req.query.key directly without validation

Title: Memory leak in useDataCache
Description: Hook does not clean up memory cache on unmount causing memory bloat

Title: Console.error in production
Description: Using console.error instead of structured logging

Title: TODO/FIXME items
Description: 50+ occurrences of TODO and FIXME comments in codebase
